projectScope.objective: mathcrew/src 전체 점검 + 교육용 컴포넌트 추가/개선. 공명고리→우주선, 펄스조각→우주복 입은 어린이로 photonicRealism 형태 전환 + interactive 대폭 강화 + 재사용 가능한 PhotonicRealism 컴포넌트 프레임워크 설계. speechBubble 레이아웃/교육 콘텐츠 구조 개선 포함.
backendDomains: DATA: SpaceshipEntityDef, SpacekidEntityDef, PhotonicMaterialPreset, PhotonicComponentDefinition, CharacterAnimationClip, TeachingStoryFrame, TeachingWorldTerms, MetaphorMapping, PlanetTeachingContent (PRESERVED), TeachingBeat (EXTENDED: microSteps[]), SpeechBubbleContent (EXTENDED: microStepIndex), CharacterAssetPipeline

LOGIC: PhotonicRealismPipeline, PhotonicComponentFactory, CharacterAnimationSystem, SpatialInteractionResolver, TeachingFrameworkMigration, PerformanceBudgetPolicy, ContentDeliveryResolver (PRESERVED), ScaffoldEscalationLogic (PRESERVED), MayerPrincipleChecker (PRESERVED), CognitiveLoadGuard (PRESERVED)

ACTION: CharacterDragPlacement, BoardingAnimation, SpatialProximityTrigger, GestureInteractionAdapter, PhotonicFeedbackEffect, AdaptiveDPRController, EnterAdvancesBeat (PRESERVED + micro-step extension), InteractionModeDispatch (MODIFIED)
SECURITY: none — no RBAC/access-control concerns for photonicRealism pipeline
frontendSurfaces: SpaceshipSurface (NEW: 3D spaceship as teaching grouping container — replaces resonanceLoop)
SpacekidCharacter (NEW: GLTF character child-in-spacesuit as counting unit — replaces pulseShard)
PhotonicEnvironment (NEW: HDRI sky, PMREMGenerator IBL, ACESFilmicToneMapping)
PromptHUD (NEW: keycap+promptText relocated to bottom-right fixed HUD — replaces prompt bar in speech bubble)
SpeechBubble (MODIFIED: phaseBasedPosition + collapseOnInteraction — occlusion solution applied)
10 InteractionMode types (PRESERVED + extended for character entities)

ddd: SpaceshipEntity / SpacekidEntity vocabulary matches user-specified domain story (우주선, 우주복 입은 어린이) — observable naming consistency from ontology through contracts to runtime
PhotonicComponentDefinition uses component/registry/factory vocabulary from ECS domain, not raw geometry params
TeachingBeat.microSteps uses 'micro-step' (교육 설계 vocabulary) not 'sub-text' or 'chunk'
DragState.dragTarget: EntityRef — uses domain reference (EntityRef), not raw Three.js mesh reference
PromptHUD / SpeechBubble naming matches HUD design vocabulary distinct from 3D scene objects
Boarding, Proximity, Discovery — narrative vocabulary maps 1:1 to ontology ACTION types
dry: Single PMREMGenerator call at scene init — auto-applies IBL to ALL MeshStandard/PhysicalMaterial; no per-entity lighting setup
Single PhotonicComponentFactory dispatches all entity type creation — no scattered per-entity factory functions
Single CharacterAnimationSystem drives all AnimationMixer instances from one shared clock.getDelta()
Single PerformanceBudgetPolicy read by PhotonicRealismPipeline AND AdaptiveDPRController — no duplicated device caps
photonic-pipeline.ts shared between H-1 (GLTF) and H-2 (procedural) paths — IBL setup not per-stack
TeachingBeat.microSteps[] consolidates beat content into one canonical location — eliminated per-phase text duplication
ocp: PhotonicComponentFactory Interface: new entity types registered via PhotonicComponentDefinition.register() — zero changes to factory core code
CharacterAnimationSystem.clipTransitionTable: new animation transitions added as data entries — system code unchanged
SpatialInteractionResolver.resolutionRules[]: new trigger conditions added as array entries — resolver Interface unchanged
PerformanceBudgetPolicy: new device profiles added as policy entries — consuming code (PhotonicRealismPipeline, AdaptiveDPRController) unchanged
SpeechBubble phaseBasedPosition: new phases mapped to positions via config — switch logic encapsulated
PhotonicFeedbackEffect.fxCatalog: new FX types added to catalog — dispatch logic closed to modification
pecs: SpacekidEntityDef (producer DATA) extends PhotonicComponentDefinition interface; PhotonicComponentFactory (consumer LOGIC) reads without concrete class binding
PhotonicMaterialPreset (producer DATA) extends material config interface; PhotonicRealismPipeline (consumer LOGIC) instantiates materials
CharacterAnimationClip[] (producer DATA) extends clip catalog; CharacterAnimationSystem (consumer LOGIC) plays clips via AnimationMixer
TeachingBeat.microSteps[] (producer DATA) extends teaching content; SpeechBubble renderer (consumer) reads step-by-step
DragState (producer DATA) extends interaction interface; DragDispatch (consumer ACTION) reads target reference generically
FSRSRetrievabilitySignal (producer LEARN) extends feedback interface; ScaffoldEscalationLogic (consumer LOGIC) reduces to tier

primitives: Struct — SpaceshipEntityDef, SpacekidEntityDef, PhotonicMaterialPreset, PhotonicComponentDefinition, CharacterAnimationClip, TeachingStoryFrame, CharacterAssetPipeline, InteractionTelemetry, PhotonicComponentUsageMetrics
ActionType — CharacterDragPlacement, BoardingAnimation, SpatialProximityTrigger, GestureInteractionAdapter, PhotonicFeedbackEffect, AdaptiveDPRController, EnterAdvancesBeat, SpeechBubbleFollow
Object-backed link — PhotonicComponentDefinition to PhotonicMaterialPreset (materialPresetIds[]), SpacekidEntityDef to CharacterAnimationClip (animationCatalog)

data.name: SpeechBubbleContent
data.description: Teaching data model: title, body, phase, vocabularyIntro, successCriteria, microStepIndex (NEW), totalMicroSteps (NEW). EXTENDED: promptText/promptKey removed to PromptHUD.

data.name: TeachingBeat
data.description: EXTENDED: TeachingBeat.microSteps: string[] — beat text split into 2-4 micro-steps for Enter-paced progression. CRA micro-phase, interactionMode, successCriteria preserved.

data.name: TroikaText
data.description: troika-three-text SDF text mesh v0.52.4. WebGL-native, compatible with n8ao + postprocessing pipeline via OverrideMaterialManager workaround.

data.name: CSS3DObject
data.description: EXCLUDED: CSS3DRenderer cannot receive WebGL postprocessing (architectural impossibility confirmed). mathcrew uses n8ao + postprocessing 6.36.7 — incompatible.

data.name: ContentDeliveryConfig
data.description: Configuration mapping (craMicroPhase, beatPhase) to rendering approach selection.

data.name: SpatialAnnotation
data.description: 3D-anchored educational annotation rendered via troika-three-text. UIType: Spatial. Anchor to math object worldPosition.

data.name: AudioNarrationSegment
data.description: Korean audio narration segment per teaching beat. url, beatIndex, language. Implements Mayer TemporalContiguity.

data.name: SpaceshipEntityDef
data.description: Replaces resonanceLoop. Procedural geometry spaceship: fuselage (CylinderGeometry), wings (BoxGeometry), engine pods. MeshPhysicalMaterial: metalness=0.85, roughness=0.15, clearcoat=1.0. PMREMGenerator IBL from Polyhaven CC0.

data.name: SpacekidEntityDef
data.description: Replaces pulseShard. GLTF character child-in-spacesuit. Kenney CC0 base + Blender spacesuit + Mixamo animations baked in GLB + gltfjsx -S -T -t. AnimationMixer for clips. SkeletonUtils.clone() for multi-instance.

data.name: PhotonicMaterialPreset
data.description: Named PBR material presets: spaceship-hull (metalness=0.85, clearcoat=1.0), visor-glass (transmission=0.95, ior=1.5), spacesuit-fabric (MeshSSSNodeMaterial, thickness=0.5), engine-glow (emissiveIntensity=2.0).

data.name: PhotonicComponentDefinition
data.description: Registry entry: componentId, entityType, geometryFn or assetUrl, materialPresetIds[], interactionModes[], lodLevels[], tags[]. Factory reads registry (OCP).

data.name: CharacterAnimationClip
data.description: Named animation clip catalog: idle (loop), walk (loop), wave (once), pickup (once), board-spaceship (once). All baked into GLB via Blender/Mixamo export. No runtime SkeletonUtils.retarget().

data.name: TeachingStoryFrame
data.description: MODIFIED: extends TeachingBeat with narrative context — storyBeatId, narrativeRole, spatialTriggerIds[], characterPlacementConstraint. Math contract (TeachingBeat) PRESERVED. Metaphor only: observatory to space station.

data.name: CharacterAssetPipeline
data.description: Offline pipeline: Kenney CC0 base + Blender spacesuit skin + Mixamo bake + gltfjsx -S -T -t to mathcrew/public/characters/spacekid.glb. Step-by-step definition.

logic.name: ContentDeliveryResolver
logic.description: PRESERVED. Selects rendering approach per CRA phase: Concrete=SpatialAnnotation, Representational=hybrid troika+SpeechBubble, Abstract=SpeechBubble primary.

logic.name: WorldToScreenProjection
logic.description: PRESERVED. Vector3.project to CSS transform for speech bubble positioning. Per-frame DOM mutation. Phase-based position override added for occlusion solution.

logic.name: CognitiveLoadGuard
logic.description: PRESERVED. CLT rules: elementary needs high guidance, no redundancy, coherence, segmenting (learner-paced beats with microSteps).

logic.name: MayerPrincipleChecker
logic.description: PRESERVED. Validates 5 CTML principles: SpatialContiguity, TemporalContiguity, Signalling, Coherence, Segmenting.

logic.name: ScaffoldEscalationLogic
logic.description: PRESERVED. 4-tier scaffold reducer: Nudge to Visual hint to Worked example to Direct instruction. Aggregates FSRSRetrievabilitySignal[].

logic.name: PostprocessingCompatibility
logic.description: PRESERVED. Compatibility matrix: CSS3DRenderer EXCLUDED (architectural impossibility), TroikaText compatible via OverrideMaterialManager, MeshPhysicalMaterial compatible with n8ao natively.

logic.name: PhotonicRealismPipeline
logic.description: 5-stage setup: (1) PMREMGenerator IBL, (2) PhotonicMaterialPreset assignment, (3) MeshSSSNodeMaterial selective (pending g-pr-01 benchmark), (4) n8ao halfRes=true SSAO, (5) EffectComposer compose.

logic.name: PhotonicComponentFactory
logic.description: OCP Factory: create(componentId, position) routes to procedural or GLTF path via PhotonicComponentDefinition registry. dispose() for Three.js resource cleanup.

logic.name: CharacterAnimationSystem
logic.description: AnimationMixer lifecycle: playClip(entity, clipId, blendDuration), stopClip, update(delta). One mixer per SkeletonUtils.clone() instance. Clip transitions: drag-start=walk, drag-end=idle, proximity-trigger=wave, boarding=board-spaceship.

logic.name: SpatialInteractionResolver
logic.description: Classifies spatial events: Vector3.distanceTo() returns BoardingTrigger or MathZoneTrigger or ScaleGesture or RotateGesture. Returns InteractionEvent (no side effects). Per-frame resolution.

logic.name: TeachingFrameworkMigration
logic.description: Derived migration scope: PRESERVE (TeachingBeat, VT/CRA, 10 InteractionModes, ts-fsrs), REPLACE (resonanceLoop to SpaceshipEntityDef, pulseShard to SpacekidEntityDef, observatory to space station), EXTEND (CharacterDragPlacement, SpatialProximityTrigger, BoardingAnimation).

logic.name: PerformanceBudgetPolicy
logic.description: Target: Chromebook Intel Iris Xe, 60fps, <100 draw calls, <16.7ms. Rules: n8ao halfRes=true mandatory; DPR cap desktop=1.0/mobile=1.5; SSS selective (pending g-pr-01); LOD 3 levels max; InstancedMesh for static-only geometry.

action.name: EnterAdvancesBeat
action.description: EXTENDED: Enter key advances through TeachingBeat.microSteps[]. All micro-steps complete then advance to next beat. Implements Mayer Segmenting.

action.name: SpeechBubbleFollow
action.description: MODIFIED: phaseBasedPosition — motivate/explain: above character (current); practice/demonstrate/assess: top-left fixed (left:20px, top:20px). collapseOnInteraction: 40px mini-bar when InteractionMode active. Per-frame CSS DOM update.

action.name: AudioNarrationTrigger
action.description: NEW: Beat advance triggers synchronized Korean narration. Redundancy principle: audio replaces duplicate text display. TemporalContiguity: simultaneous with text.

action.name: TroikaTextSync
action.description: NEW: Async SDF text update via .sync(callback). Web worker generates SDF atlas. preloadFont() for Korean+math chars at scene init.

action.name: SpatialSignalling
action.description: 3D visual highlights (emissive glow, particle trails, scale pulses) anchored to referenced math objects. Implements Mayer Signalling Principle.

action.name: CharacterDragPlacement
action.description: H-5 DragControls proxy pattern: invisible BoxMesh proxy + DragControls + characterGroup.position.copy(proxy.position) per frame. Grid snap: Math.round(pos/CELL_SIZE)*CELL_SIZE. drag:start=walk anim, drag:end=idle anim. SpatialInteractionResolver.resolve() on drag:end. touch-action:none on canvas.

action.name: BoardingAnimation
action.description: Narrative sequence: BoardingTrigger fires + walk toward spaceship (tween position) + board-spaceship clip + TeachingBeat advance. Requires GLTF spacekid with board-spaceship animation clip (H-1 only).

action.name: SpatialProximityTrigger
action.description: Per-frame: Vector3.distanceTo(character, zone.center) < zone.radius fires MathZoneTrigger event + wave animation clip + ContentDeliveryResolver beat dispatch. Hysteresis: reset at 1.2x radius.

action.name: GestureInteractionAdapter
action.description: Tablet gestures: pinch-to-scale, two-finger rotate, long-press. PointerEvents API with setPointerCapture. Edge safety: reject starts within 20px top/left/right, 48px bottom (GEST.OS-02). touch-action:none (PE.TA-01).

action.name: PhotonicFeedbackEffect
action.description: Photonic-style feedback: correct=engine-glow-pulse (emissiveIntensity 0 to 2.0 to 0.5, 0.6s), incorrect=shield-flicker (red flash, 3x 0.3s), discovery=particle-burst (50 particles). GSAP tween or manual lerp.

action.name: AdaptiveDPRController
action.description: 60-frame FPS window: <55fps triggers DPR-0.1 (min 0.75); >60fps for 120 frames triggers DPR+0.1 (max desktop=1.0, mobile=1.5). disableSSS_below=50fps. renderer.setPixelRatio(dpr) on change.

learn.name: ContentEngagement
learn.description: PRESERVED. Tracks per-beat: sessionId, beatIndex, approachUsed, craPhase, vtDimension, dwellTimeMs, interactionDepth, fsrsR, scaffoldTierUsed, masteryGainedAfterBeat.

learn.name: FSRSScheduling
learn.description: PRESERVED. ts-fsrs 5.3.1. R-to-content-intensity mapping: low-R concepts trigger reinforcement delivery mode in ContentDeliveryResolver. FSRS-7 upgrade path preserved.

learn.name: ResearchGapRegistry
learn.description: 3 open gaps from prior session: g-01 (troika+n8ao FPS), g-02 (troika r183 compat), g-03 (FSRS adaptive pacing). Plus 3 photonic-realism gaps: g-pr-01 (SSS FPS), g-pr-02 (clone draw calls), g-pr-03 (DragControls jitter).

learn.name: InteractionTelemetry
learn.description: Photonic-specific interaction events: drag-placed, proximity-trigger, boarding-completed, gesture-applied, fx-played, clip-played. Extends ContentEngagement with position3D, entityId, componentId, teachingOutcome.

learn.name: PhotonicComponentUsageMetrics
learn.description: Aggregated per PhotonicComponentDefinition: totalInteractions, interactionsByMode, averageTeachingOutcomeScore, fpsImpactProfile (sssActive, avgDPR, avgFPS), clipUsageFrequency.

recommendedStack.name: Three.js PhotonicRealism Stack — H-1+H-3+H-5 (Hybrid: H-2 procedural start then H-1 GLTF pivot via H-3 OCP)

technologies.name: Three.js r183 (0.183.2)
strengths: All required APIs stable: GLTFLoader, AnimationMixer, MeshPhysicalMaterial, PMREMGenerator, DragControls (tier-1 official docs)
r183 fixes: empty groups with multiple scene references (GLTF), PMREM cache, BezierInterpolant DEVTOOLS
MeshPhysicalMaterial compatible with n8ao SSAO natively — no OverrideMaterialManager needed
weaknesses: MeshSSSNodeMaterial FPS cost on Chromebook Intel Iris Xe unverified (g-pr-01 OPEN)
SkeletonUtils.clone() x5 draw call budget on Chromebook unverified (g-pr-02 OPEN)
DragControls proxy + AnimationMixer crossFadeTo concurrent jitter risk (g-pr-03 PARTIALLY_ADDRESSED)

technologies.name: GLTFLoader + DRACOLoader
strengths: loadAsync(url) returns Promise<GLTF> with scene (Group) + animations (AnimationClip[])
DRACOLoader: 80-90% geometry compression — use only if GLB > 500KB
r183 GLTF fix: empty groups with multiple scene references resolved
weaknesses: Kenney Animated Characters 3 r183 AnimationMixer compat unverified (asset gap)

technologies.name: AnimationMixer + SkeletonUtils
strengths: crossFadeTo(action, durationSeconds, warp) for smooth clip blending
SkeletonUtils.clone() provides independent bone hierarchy per SpacekidEntity instance
One mixer per clone, shared clock.getDelta() — efficient multi-instance update
weaknesses: AVOID SkeletonUtils.retarget() — inverted feet/backward hands with different-proportion skeletons (use pre-baked GLB clips)

technologies.name: MeshPhysicalMaterial + MeshSSSNodeMaterial
strengths: clearcoat(1.0) + iridescence(0.3) + envMap: visor glass photonicRealism achievable
metalness=0.85 + roughness=0.15 + clearcoat=0.5: spaceship hull photonicRealism
Feature-flagged: enable only needed features per entity type
weaknesses: transmission is most expensive feature — selective use only for visor
MeshSSSNodeMaterial WebGPU-tier — Chromebook FPS cost unverified (g-pr-01)

technologies.name: PMREMGenerator + RGBELoader
strengths: scene.environment = pmremGenerator.fromEquirectangular(texture).texture — one-time GPU op at scene init
Auto-applies PBR lighting to ALL MeshStandard/PhysicalMaterial in scene
ACESFilmicToneMapping + toneMappingExposure=1.8 is standard photonicRealism renderer config
Poly Haven CC0 HDRIs 1K-8K — 1K-2K sufficient for education (1-8MB)
weaknesses: r152+ default: outputColorSpace=SRGBColorSpace — do NOT set explicitly to avoid double-correction

technologies.name: DragControls (Three.js addons) + Proxy Pattern
strengths: GLTF animated models require invisible BoxGeometry proxy — DragControls attached to proxy array (g-pr-04 RESOLVED via rf-T7-05)
OrbitControls disable/enable on dragstart/dragend prevents camera conflict
Grid snap formula: Math.round(pos.x / CELL_SIZE) * CELL_SIZE confirmed
dragend fires InteractionMode state transition — clean integration with registerMode() pattern
weaknesses: crossFadeTo concurrent with active drag — jitter risk (g-pr-03 PARTIALLY_ADDRESSED)

technologies.name: n8ao 1.10.1 + postprocessing 6.36.7
strengths: halfRes=true: SSAO cost halved — Chromebook 60fps escape valve
MeshPhysicalMaterial compatible with n8ao SSAO natively
Existing mathcrew pipeline preserved — GLTF models participate naturally
weaknesses: halfRes reduces SSAO quality — acceptable trade for Chromebook 60fps target

recommendedStack.rationale: H-1 (GLTF+AnimationMixer+IBL) wins for SpacekidEntity rendering: tier-1 official APIs with 5+ year stability, clean D/L/A surface, teaching framework migration is metaphor-layer-only (zero VT/CRA/beats contract change). H-3 (Factory+Registry) wins for component architecture: OCP extension via Map<ComponentType, CreateFn> with zero external dependencies — miniplex adds ~2KB overhead for marginal benefit at <50 entity scale. H-5 (DragControls+Proxy) wins for interaction: official Three.js built-in with proxy pattern resolving GLTF+AnimationMixer incompatibility (g-pr-04 RESOLVED via rf-T7-05); grid snap formula confirmed; clean registerMode() integration. SpaceshipEntity uses procedural geometry (H-2 approach) as it extends existing mathcrew pattern with no animation rig. HYBRID path: build H-2 procedural SpacekidEntity first (1 week fast path) then user engagement validation then H-3 registry.set() pivot to H-1 GLTF if engagement insufficient. All sources tier-1/2 official docs. Evaluator gate: 14/14 PASS.

alternatives.name: H-2 Procedural + H-4 miniplex + H-6 Gesture — Full Alternative Stack
alternatives.whyNot: H-2 procedural SpacekidEntity: engagement with Korean elementary school students unresolvable by research alone (FM-T8-001, high severity, UNRESOLVABLE — requires user study). H-4 miniplex: adds ~2KB external dependency for marginal benefit at <50 entity scale vs H-3 TypeScript Map zero-dependency. H-6 gesture: requires bespoke GestureClassifier (no Three.js built-in) + OS edge gesture conflicts (iOS swipe-up dock, Android nav gestures) are high risk for structured grid-based math game. H-6 rejects discrete grid snap — changes math manipulative semantics. Viable as Phase 3 upgrade path for open-ended exploration modes, not for initial PhotonicRealism migration.

alternatives.name: React Three Fiber + @react-three/drei
alternatives.whyNot: mathcrew is TypeScript + Vite + Bun with no React runtime. Adding RTF would require full renderer refactor — architecturally out of scope. Three.js addons provide equivalent functionality natively.

alternatives.name: miniplex ECS (H-4) as component system
alternatives.whyNot: H-3 Factory+Registry preferred at current scale (<50 entities). miniplex v2.0.0 last published 3 years ago (2587 weekly downloads). Migration path from H-3 to miniplex is clean — treat H-4 as future upgrade when entity count exceeds 50.

forwardProp.description: PhotonicRealism ontology to contracts to runtime propagation chain
steps: DATA layer: SpaceshipEntityDef + SpacekidEntityDef + PhotonicMaterialPreset (entity configs) to PhotonicComponentDefinition (registry entries)
DATA to LOGIC: PhotonicComponentDefinition to PhotonicComponentFactory.create() to Three.js Group instantiation with MeshPhysicalMaterial
DATA to LOGIC: PhotonicMaterialPreset to PhotonicRealismPipeline to PMREMGenerator.fromEquirectangular() to scene.environment IBL auto-applied
DATA to LOGIC: CharacterAnimationClip catalog to CharacterAnimationSystem.playClip() to AnimationMixer.clipAction().fadeIn().play()
DATA to LOGIC: SnapGridConfig + DragState to SpatialInteractionResolver.resolve() to InteractionEvent classification
LOGIC to ACTION: CharacterAnimationSystem to CharacterDragPlacement (drag:start/end) to AnimationMixer clip transitions
LOGIC to ACTION: SpatialInteractionResolver to BoardingAnimation or SpatialProximityTrigger or GestureInteractionAdapter dispatch
LOGIC to ACTION: PerformanceBudgetPolicy to AdaptiveDPRController to renderer.setPixelRatio() dynamic adjustment
ACTION to Teaching Framework: dragend/proximity/boarding to InteractionMode state transitions via registerMode() pattern to EnterAdvancesBeat to TeachingBeat.microSteps progression
Teaching Framework to HUD: SpeechBubbleContent.microStepIndex to SpeechBubbleFollow (phaseBasedPosition + collapseOnInteraction) to PromptHUD bottom-right fixed
HUD to WebGL2 render: EffectComposer (RenderPass to n8ao AOPass to OutputPass) to screen output
gaps: PhotonicComponentFactory not yet implemented in mathcrew/src/
Polyhaven CC0 HDRI not yet downloaded to mathcrew/public/hdri/
SpacekidEntity GLB not yet created (requires Blender + Mixamo workflow execution)
DragControls proxy pattern not yet in interaction-controller.ts
touch-action:none not yet applied to canvas
TeachingBeat.microSteps field not yet in src/types/teaching.ts
SpeechBubble phaseBasedPosition + collapseOnInteraction not yet implemented
PromptHUD component not yet in src/hud/hud.ts

backwardProp.description: Runtime events to lineage to evaluation to refinement to ontology updates
steps: ACTION runtime events to InteractionTelemetry (LEARN): drag-placed, proximity-trigger, boarding-completed, gesture-applied, fx-played, clip-played captured per frame in game-loop.ts
InteractionTelemetry to PhotonicComponentUsageMetrics (LEARN): aggregated interaction frequency + teaching outcome scores per componentId
PhotonicComponentUsageMetrics to evaluator R9 evidence sufficiency gate to blueprint confidence updates
PhotonicComponentUsageMetrics.fpsImpactProfile to AdaptiveDPRController.dprHistory to PerformanceBudgetPolicy device class refinement
AdaptiveDPRController.fpsHistory below 50fps threshold to SSS disable signal to PhotonicRealismPipeline.stage3_sss conditional toggle
ContentEngagement.masteryGainedAfterBeat to FSRSReviewLog cross-reference to R trajectory trend to TeachingBeat sequence refinement
ContentEngagement.scaffoldTierUsed to ScaffoldEscalationLogic tier threshold calibration to ContentDeliveryResolver rule update
InteractionTelemetry.clipPlayedId frequency to CharacterAnimationClip catalog priority ordering to CharacterAssetPipeline next GLB export

ResearchGapRegistry: g-pr-01 (SSS FPS benchmark) resolved to PerformanceBudgetPolicy SSS rule update; g-pr-02 (clone draw calls) resolved to SpacekidEntityDef LOD levels update; g-pr-03 (DragControls jitter) resolved to CharacterDragPlacement proxy sync strategy update
LEARN to ontology updates: gap resolution findings to world-model.json refresh to forward prop chain health upgrades from partial to healthy
gaps: InteractionTelemetry emit not yet in game-loop.ts
ContentEngagement emit points not in game-loop.ts
FSRSReviewLog cross-reference with ContentEngagement not implemented
AdaptiveDPRController FPS rolling window not in game-loop.ts
Automated CTML violation detection not in eval suite
Gap-resolution to ontology update cycle not automated

implementationStrategy.name: Golden Tables
implementationStrategy.description: Define all entity DATA structures, material preset catalog, component registry, and teaching framework type extensions. Establish type contracts before any rendering code. Also includes speechBubble type changes.
deliverables: src/types/entities.ts — SpaceshipEntityDef, SpacekidEntityDef (Struct types)
src/types/photonic.ts — PhotonicMaterialPreset, PhotonicComponentDefinition, CharacterAnimationClip (Struct types)
src/types/teaching.ts — TeachingBeat.microSteps: string[] addition, SpeechBubbleContent.microStepIndex: number addition
src/rendering/photonic-materials.ts — 4 standard PhotonicMaterialPreset instances: spaceship-hull, visor-glass, spacesuit-fabric, engine-glow
src/config/component-registry.ts — initial PhotonicComponentDefinition entries for spaceship, spacekid, environment entity types
mathcrew/public/hdri/ — Poly Haven CC0 HDRI 1K (e.g. kloofendal_48d_partly_cloudy_1k.hdr)
Kenney Space Kit GLB assets downloaded to mathcrew/public/models/spaceship/
dependencies: Polyhaven.com HDRI download (CC0, no auth required)
Kenney.nl Space Kit download (CC0, no auth required)

implementationStrategy.name: Operational Decision-Making
implementationStrategy.description: Implement PhotonicRealism rendering pipeline, entity factory, animation system, drag interaction, teaching framework metaphor migration, and speechBubble redesign. All LOGIC and ACTION systems operational. 5-8 weeks total.
deliverables: src/rendering/photonic-pipeline.ts — PMREMGenerator + RGBELoader IBL setup, ACESFilmicToneMapping, n8ao halfRes integration (0.5 week)
src/scene/entities/create-spaceship-entity.ts — Kenney Space Kit GLTFLoader or procedural geometry, PhotonicMaterialPreset applied (0.5 week)

src/scene/entities/create-spacekid-entity.ts — Phase 2A: procedural geometry SpacekidEntity (1 week fast path); Phase 2B: GLTF + AnimationMixer + SkeletonUtils.clone() + DragControls proxy (2-3 weeks after engagement validation)
src/scene/systems/animation-system.ts — AnimationMixer per-frame update, playClip/crossFadeTo, clipTransitionTable
src/scene/systems/drag-system.ts — DragControls proxy setup, OrbitControls integration, grid snap formula, touch-action:none
src/scene/systems/spatial-interaction-resolver.ts — Vector3.distanceTo proximity rules, InteractionEvent dispatch
interaction-controller.ts — ADD DragControls integration, dragend triggers registerMode() InteractionMode transition (ADD not REPLACE)
src/scene/entities/create-resonance-loop.ts REPLACED by create-spaceship-entity.ts
src/scene/entities/create-pulse-shard.ts REPLACED by create-spacekid-entity.ts
teaching-story-framework.ts — METAPHOR LAYER ONLY rename (resonance-loop to spaceship, pulse-shard to spacekid)
src/hud/speech-bubble.ts — prompt bar removal, phaseBasedPosition logic, collapseOnInteraction CSS class
src/hud/hud.ts — PromptHUD component (keycap + promptText, position: fixed; bottom:20px; right:20px)
src/systems/teaching-flow.ts — micro-step progression logic (Enter increments microStepIndex before beat advance)
src/game-loop.ts — micro-step index management + collapseOnInteraction trigger on mode activation
src/config/teaching-content.ts — PLANET_CONTENT beats text to microSteps[] refactor (all 5 planets)
Phase 2A total: 5-6 weeks (procedural spacekid). Phase 2B delta: +2 weeks (GLTF spacekid after engagement validation passes)
dependencies: Phase 2A: procedural geometry only — no external GLTF asset pipeline needed
Phase 2B: Kenney Animated Characters 3 verified OR Mixamo FBX to Blender to GLB pipeline executed
Engagement validation: informal test with 3-5 Korean elementary students comparing procedural vs GLTF character preference
g-pr-01 benchmark: stats.js FPS on Chromebook with MeshSSSNodeMaterial — must pass >50fps before spacesuit-fabric preset enabled

implementationStrategy.name: AI-First
implementationStrategy.description: Enable adaptive content delivery driven by InteractionTelemetry + FSRS backward propagation. Automated gap resolution and policy refinement from runtime data.
deliverables: InteractionTelemetry emit in game-loop.ts — spatial events captured
PhotonicComponentUsageMetrics aggregation pipeline — evaluator R9 evidence sufficiency upgrade
AdaptiveDPRController in game-loop.ts — FPS rolling window + SSS conditional toggle
ContentEngagement emit points — masteryGainedAfterBeat cross-referenced to FSRSReviewLog
ScaffoldEscalationLogic integration — ContentDeliveryResolver reads R signal for scaffold tier selection
SpatialAnnotation on math manipulables — CTML SpatialContiguity violation resolved for CRA Concrete phase
AudioNarrationTrigger — Korean TTS synchronized with microStep beat text
H-6 Gesture+Spatial as enhancement — open-ended exploration mode (post-H-5 validation only)
Automated CTML violation detection in eval suite
dependencies: g-pr-01, g-pr-02, g-pr-03 runtime benchmarks completed
Teaching content microSteps[] fully authored for all 5 planets

evaluatorReason: 14 PASS, 0 FAIL, 1 N/A (R2). Session mathcrew-photonic-realism-001. Round 1. No debate triggered. Independent verification: bun test T7 33/33 (18ms, 83 assertions) + T8 35/35 (19ms, 74 assertions). bunx tsc --noEmit: 0 errors. All sources tier-1 (7) or tier-2 (1). Zero stale evidence. 43 ontology objects with DDD/DRY/OCP/PECS. 6 hypotheses (H-1 to H-6), 24 scenarios (4 per hypothesis), 11-dim scoring, 2 revision rounds. Winning combination: H-1 (GLTF+AnimationMixer+IBL) + H-3 (Factory+Registry) + H-5 (DragControls+Proxy). Alternative upgrade path: H-2+H-4+H-6. Hybrid recommendation: H-2 procedural start then H-1 GLTF pivot via H-3 Factory+Registry OCP. 3 critical runtime gaps remain open (g-pr-01 SSS FPS, g-pr-02 clone draw calls, g-pr-03 DragControls jitter) — do not block recommendation but require prototype benchmarks before production enablement. Teaching framework migration confirmed METAPHOR-LAYER-ONLY. All propagation paths partial (designed but not yet implemented — expected at this research stage).

speechBubbleRedesign.sessionContext: User directive: '말풍선 내용이 너무 많아 짤림 — 키 설명(keycap+promptText)은 화면 오른쪽 아래 등으로 분리. 교육 콘텐츠를 더 쪼개서 진행하는 프레임워크 개선 필수. Blueprint에 포함.'
currentProblems: card width clamp(280px, 36vw, 400px) + overflow:hidden — 긴 내용 짤림
6개 요소(header, title, body, vocab, criteria, prompt)가 400px 카드에 모두 포함
body 텍스트(15.5px, line-height 1.62)가 다단으로 길어지면 카드 높이 폭발
vocabulary callout + success criteria가 body와 함께 있어서 인지 부하 가중
OCCLUSION: 말풍선이 캐릭터 위(ANCHOR_Y_OFFSET=1.0)에 고정 — 캐릭터가 보는 3D 오브젝트(spaceship, spacekid) 가림
translate(-50%, -100%)로 캐릭터 바로 위 고정 — practice/demonstrate 페이즈에서 인터랙티브 3D 오브젝트와 겹침
카메라 각도/줌에 따라 말풍선이 화면 대부분을 차지할 수 있음 (특히 모바일/태블릿)

promptBarRelocation.description: keycap + promptText를 화면 오른쪽 하단 독립 HUD 요소(PromptHUD)로 분리. 말풍선에서 제거.
promptBarRelocation.newComponent: PromptHUD — CSS: position:fixed; bottom:20px; right:20px; z-index:100. 말풍선 카드에서 prompt-bar HTML 요소 제거.

contentGranularity.description: 1 beat = 1 큰 텍스트 블록에서 1 beat = 2-4 micro-step으로 분할. Enter가 microStepIndex를 순차 진행. 마지막 micro-step 완료 후 다음 beat로 전진.
contentGranularity.dataChange: TeachingBeat.microSteps: string[] (기존 text: string 대체). SpeechBubbleContent.microStepIndex: number 추가.

proposedSolution.vocabSeparation: vocabulary callout를 3D 공간의 SpatialAnnotation (troika-three-text) 또는 별도 HUD 카드로 분리. Phase 2/3 구현 대상.
proposedSolution.criteriaSeparation: success criteria를 HUD 상단 또는 progress bar 근처로 이동. Phase 2 구현 대상.

occlusionSolution.recommended: phaseBasedPosition + collapseOnInteraction 조합 — 가장 낮은 구현 복잡도로 occlusion 문제 해결. smartAvoidance는 Phase 3 후보.

phaseBasedPosition.description: motivate/explain: 캐릭터 위(현재 translate(-50%,-100%) 유지). practice/demonstrate/assess: 화면 상단 좌측 고정 위치 (left:20px, top:20px). tail 숨김.
phaseBasedPosition.implementation: speech-bubble.ts update()에서 data.phase 확인 후 practice/demonstrate/assess이면 fixed position top-left 적용.

collapseOnInteraction.description: InteractionMode 활성화 시 말풍선이 40px 높이 미니 바(제목만)로 자동 축소. 탭/클릭으로 펼침.
collapseOnInteraction.implementation: SpeechBubbleContent에 collapsed:boolean 추가. interaction-controller.ts mode 활성화 시 collapsed=true emit. CSS: .speech-bubble--collapsed { height:40px; overflow:hidden; cursor:pointer; }. 클릭 시 toggle.

occlusionSolution.smartAvoidance: Phase 3 후보: 말풍선 위치와 teaching surface screen-projection 비교하여 겹침 감지 후 반대편 자동 재배치.

frameworkChanges: SpeechBubbleContent에 microStepIndex: number 추가 — Enter가 micro-step 순차 진행
모든 micro-step 완료 후 다음 beat로 전진 (기존 beat 전진 로직 위에 micro-step 레이어 추가)
promptText/promptKey를 별도 PromptHUD 컴포넌트로 분리 (화면 오른쪽 하단 fixed position)
teaching-content.ts의 PLANET_CONTENT beats 텍스트를 microSteps[] 배열로 리팩터 (Phase 1 deliverable)
impactFiles: src/hud/speech-bubble.ts — prompt bar 제거, card overflow 개선, phaseBasedPosition 로직, collapseOnInteraction CSS class
src/hud/hud.ts — PromptHUD 컴포넌트 추가 (오른쪽 하단 fixed HUD)
src/systems/teaching-flow.ts — micro-step 진행 로직 (Enter가 microStepIndex 증가 후 마지막 step에서 nextBeat)
src/game-loop.ts — micro-step index 관리 + collapseOnInteraction trigger on mode activation
src/config/teaching-content.ts — beats text를 microSteps[] 변환 (전체 PLANET_CONTENT 리팩터)

photonicRealismComponentFramework.description: Reusable PhotonicRealism component framework — math-concept agnostic. Any new math concept (분수, 비율, 기하 등) adds entity types via registry without changing factory core.

registryPattern.extensionPoint: registry.set('new-math-entity', createNewMathEntity); // Zero factory code changes (OCP principle)
registryPattern.factoryDispatch: ComponentFactory(type, spec, scene): reads registry.get(type), throws for unknown types, dispatches to createFn
registryPattern.typeContract: type ComponentType = 'spacekid' | 'spaceship' | 'environment' | ...; type CreateFn = (spec: ComponentSpec, scene: THREE.Scene) => ComponentInstance;

materialPresetCatalog.spaceship-hull: MeshPhysicalMaterial: metalness=0.85, roughness=0.15, clearcoat=1.0, clearcoatRoughness=0.1, envMapIntensity=1.5
materialPresetCatalog.spacesuit-fabric: MeshSSSNodeMaterial: color=#E8D5B7, thickness=0.5, scatterDistance=0.3, roughness=0.8 (g-pr-01 benchmark required before production)

photonicRealismComponentFramework.animationSystemReuse: CharacterAnimationSystem is entity-type agnostic: playClip(entity, clipId, blendDuration) works for any SkinnedMesh entity. New math entities with animations: register in component registry + bake clips in GLB.
photonicRealismComponentFramework.interactionSystemReuse: SpatialInteractionResolver is entity-type agnostic: new proximity triggers added via TeachingStoryFrame.spatialTriggerIds[]. New drag-enabled entities: register proxy mesh via DragControls.
photonicRealismComponentFramework.feedbackFXReuse: PhotonicFeedbackEffect.fxCatalog is entity-agnostic: correct/incorrect/discovery FX applicable to any entity type. New FX: add catalog entry + emissiveIntensity tween.
photonicRealismComponentFramework.mathConceptMigrationPath: New math concept (e.g. 분수): (1) Define FractionBarEntityDef (DATA Struct), (2) Create PhotonicMaterialPreset, (3) Register createFractionBarEntity in ComponentFactory registry, (4) Define spatialTriggerIds in TeachingStoryFrame, (5) Author TeachingBeat.microSteps[] content. Zero changes to PhotonicRealismPipeline, CharacterAnimationSystem, SpatialInteractionResolver, or PhotonicFeedbackEffect.

openGaps.description: MeshSSSNodeMaterial FPS cost on Chromebook Intel Iris Xe — benchmark required before enabling spacesuit-fabric preset in production
openGaps.affectedDecision: PhotonicMaterialPreset spacesuit-fabric enablement and PerformanceBudgetPolicy SSS rule
openGaps.nextExperiment: stats.js FPS benchmark: render 1 SpacekidEntity with MeshSSSNodeMaterial on head mesh + n8ao SSAO active. Measure 5s on Chromebook-class GPU (Intel UHD 620 or Iris Xe). Target: >50fps. Fail action: substitute MeshPhysicalMaterial roughness/specular approximation + feature flag behind performance tier detection.

openGaps.description: SkeletonUtils.clone() x5 simultaneous draw call budget on Chromebook 60fps target — unverified
openGaps.affectedDecision: SpacekidEntityDef max simultaneous instance count and PerformanceBudgetPolicy <100 draw calls rule
openGaps.nextExperiment: Load SpacekidEntity GLTF, SkeletonUtils.clone() x5, AnimationMixer per clone, idle animation on all. Read renderer.info.render.calls after one frame. Measure FPS over 5s. Target: <100 draw calls + >50fps. Fail action: max 3 simultaneous instances + LOD (Three.js LOD class) for instances at distance.

openGaps.description: DragControls proxy position.copy() + AnimationMixer crossFadeTo concurrent — visual root position jitter risk during 0.3s blend transition
openGaps.affectedDecision: CharacterDragPlacement proxy sync strategy — per-frame vs postRender step
openGaps.nextExperiment: Load animated SpacekidEntity. Start idle, initiate DragControls drag, trigger crossFadeTo(walkAction, 0.3, true) during drag. Observe root Group position for jitter over 0.3s window. Check if GLB has root motion keyframes. Fail action: move modelGroup.position.copy() to postRender step after mixer.update(), or bake-in-place in Blender.
